new: Next.js 14 App Router - Complete migration from React Router to Next.js App Router
Client-Side Authentication - Redux-based authentication with localStorage persistence
Login API Endpoint - Standalone authentication API endpoint
HTML Documentation - Complete ThemeForest user documentation with sidebar navigation
Protected Route Component - Client-side route protection without server middleware
Modern Authentication Flow - Works seamlessly with or without basePath configuration
fixed: Removed NextAuth JWT session limitations that prevented authentication without basePath
Fixed authentication redirect issues when basePath is empty
Fixed middleware session validation problems at root level
Resolved client-side navigation issues after authentication
Fixed XSS vulnerabilities in utilities.js and Ordersummary.js (replaced innerHTML with safe DOM methods)
updated: Migrated from React Router to Next.js App Router
Replaced NextAuth JWT sessions with client-side authentication
Updated authentication to use Redux + localStorage for persistence
Simplified middleware to pass-through (no server-side session validation)
Enhanced ProtectedRoute component with localStorage hydration support
Updated authentication utilities to use Redux instead of NextAuth hooks
Improved security by sanitizing HTML content to prevent XSS attacks
removed: Removed server-side session validation from middleware
